description: Estimate and map the daytime versus nighttime populations across San Francisco zones using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/day_night_population.ipynb. Using the datasets in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 and geometries in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/zones.json, calculate the nighttime population, resident workers (handling missing worker data as 50% of persons), daytime jobs, total daytime population, population surge, and day/night ratio per zone. Export a CSV of the top 15 zones by surge to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_daytime_surge_zones.csv with the columns: zone_id, nighttime_pop, zone_workers, daytime_jobs, daytime_pop, surge, and day_night_ratio. Generate a choropleth map of the day/night ratio saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/day_night_ratio_map.png. Ensure all notebook cells are executed.
